summary: Blazor-specific ReactiveUI guidance for reactive components, lifecycle hooks, and server/WASM execution differences.
recommendedPatterns: Use ReactiveComponentBase<T> or related reactive base components.
Be explicit about rerender boundaries and component lifecycle.
Keep ViewModel lifetime and subscription management deliberate.
avoidPatterns: Do not assume desktop UI thread semantics in Blazor.
Do not bury component updates inside ad hoc event glue when ReactiveUI activation can be used.
setupSteps: Choose server or WASM-specific hosting setup as needed.
Use reactive component base classes for view integration.
commonPitfalls: Confusing server and WASM scheduler behavior.
Ignoring StateHasChanged or component refresh semantics in reactive flows.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
